task_completion.description: Navigate to the Contacts module in SuiteCRM Studio
task_completion.visual_evidence: SuiteCRM Studio interface is open with the 'Contacts' module selected in the module tree or main panel.

task_completion.description: Set the new field data type to DropDown
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field creation form is open with the 'Data Type' dropdown selected as 'DropDown'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Field Name and Field Label
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field creation form shows 'preferred_contact_method' in the Field Name input and 'Preferred Contact Method' in the Field Label input.

task_completion.description: Create or select the correct Dropdown List with specified options
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Dropdown List field shows 'preferred_contact_method_list' selected, or the Dropdown Editor is visible showing the exact Item Names (keys): 'phone', 'email', 'sms', 'mail' with their corresponding labels.

task_completion.description: Set the Default Value and ensure Required/Audited are unchecked
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Default Value' dropdown is set to 'email' (or Email), and the 'Required Field' and 'Audit' checkboxes are visibly unchecked.
The Fields list view for the Contacts module is displayed, showing the newly created 'preferred_contact_method_c' field in the list.

integrity.description: Agent used the SuiteCRM web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SuiteCRM web application in a browser, not terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent did not add the field to any layouts
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent navigating to the Layouts section (EditView, DetailView, etc.) and dragging the new field into a layout panel.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created the dropdown list in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The dropdown list creation occurred within the SuiteCRM Dropdown Editor popup or Studio interface, rather than being typed into a separate text editor or script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected database field name is 'preferred_contact_method_c' in the 'Contacts' module. The field type is 'enum' (DropDown). The dropdown list name is 'preferred_contact_method_list' with exact keys: 'phone', 'email', 'sms', 'mail'. SuiteCRM automatically appends '_c' to custom field names.
